description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage. Add a docs job that uses the python:3.6 image and runs: pip install sphinx; cd docs; sphinx-build -M singlehtml . _build; sphinx-build -M linkcheck . _build | tee linkcheck.log; if grep 'ok.*- unauthorized' linkcheck.log; then false; fi. Add a flake8 job that also uses python:3.6 and runs: pip install tox; tox -e flake8. Add a py27 job using python:2.7 that runs: pip install tox; tox -e 'py27-sphinx_{oldest,latest}'. Add a py36 job using python:3.6 that runs: pip install tox; tox -e 'py36-sphinx_{oldest,fedora,latest}'. All jobs are assigned to the test stage.
